results.description: Colocated #[cfg(test)] blocks only permitted when testing private methods

violations.message: Source file 'main\src\api\strategy\traits\strategy.rs' has a #[cfg(test)] block but only public functions; move tests to tests/<name>_test.rs
violations.fix_hint: Move tests to a standalone tests/<name>_test.rs file

results.description: Sibling files sharing a common prefix must be grouped into a subdirectory module (e.g., check_runner.rs + check_result.rs → check/runner.rs + check/result.rs)

violations.message: 3 files in main/src/api/auth/types/ share prefix 'auth': auth_config, auth_middleware, auth_svc — group into main/src/api/auth/types/auth/
violations.fix_hint: Create a subdirectory named after the shared prefix and move files into it (e.g., `check_runner.rs` → `check/runner.rs`)

violations.message: 3 files in main/src/api/types/ share prefix 'auth': auth_config, auth_middleware, auth_svc — group into main/src/api/types/auth/
violations.fix_hint: Create a subdirectory named after the shared prefix and move files into it (e.g., `check_runner.rs` → `check/runner.rs`)

violations.message: 3 files in main/src/api/strategy/types/ share prefix 'aws': aws_sig_v4_strategy_builder, aws_sig_v4_strategy_config, aws_sig_v4_strategy_config_builder — group into main/src/api/strategy/types/aws/
violations.fix_hint: Create a subdirectory named after the shared prefix and move files into it (e.g., `check_runner.rs` → `check/runner.rs`)

results.description: saf/ must not re-export traits via pub use — wrap trait methods as standalone functions instead

violations.message: File contains forbidden pattern '^\s*pub\s+use\s+.*::(\w+Runner|\w+Scanner|\w+Reporter|\w+Sink|\w+Engine)\b|^\s*pub\s+use\s+crate::api::traits::'
violations.fix_hint: Remove `pub use` of traits from saf/; instead, add standalone pub fn wrappers that call the trait impl internally

results.description: api/ root must not contain loose .rs files or mixed-layout directories — only mod.rs at root; no flat traits/types/error/ dirs when domain-grouped layout (api/<domain>/traits/) is active

violations.message: Mixed layout: flat 'error/' at api/ root conflicts with domain-grouped api/<domain>/error/ directories — use one layout consistently
violations.fix_hint: Move the contents of api/error/ into the appropriate api/<domain>/error/ directory and remove the flat error/ dir

violations.message: Mixed layout: flat 'traits/' at api/ root conflicts with domain-grouped api/<domain>/traits/ directories — use one layout consistently
violations.fix_hint: Move the contents of api/traits/ into the appropriate api/<domain>/traits/ directory and remove the flat traits/ dir

violations.message: Mixed layout: flat 'types/' at api/ root conflicts with domain-grouped api/<domain>/types/ directories — use one layout consistently
violations.fix_hint: Move the contents of api/types/ into the appropriate api/<domain>/types/ directory and remove the flat types/ dir

results.description: Source files must not suppress the dead_code lint via #[allow(dead_code)]

violations.message: #[allow(dead_code)] at line 4 — remove the suppression and delete or wire up the dead code
violations.expected: remove #[allow(dead_code)] and delete or implement the dead item
violations.fix_hint: Fix the issue detected by builtin check 'no_allow_dead_code'
